title: A Devotee is Always Happy | HG Amitasana Dasa
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So, we are now in a transition phase, actually if we analyze. We are not fully Krishna conscious,
we are not like Prabhupada, sent person, always acting for Krishna's pleasure,
always remembering Krishna. And to some extent, we are realized that we are in Maya.
By Prabhupada's mercy, we have started practicing principles of Krishna consciousness. Neither we
are fully Krishna conscious, nor we are completely conditioned. Slowly by practicing these principles,
we are elevating from the lower modes and our consciousness is getting
purified. The more and more we get purified, the more and more we will feel liberated. More and
more we will feel free from the clutches of Maya, clutches of material existence. How do we know if
we are also struggling, we are not happy, full of anxiety, then that means we are in clutches of
Maya. Krishna consciousness, when a person is Krishna conscious, dependent on Krishna,
then one of the symptoms would be he will be happy. Whatever is happening, Krishna is there,
Krishna is taking care, Krishna is taking me through this.
